name: Mention
highlight_text: Category: Media Monitoring and Social Media Management Platform
description:
What Mention Does

Mention is a white-label media monitoring and social media management platform. It helps businesses listen to, analyze, and react to online discussions about their brand, market, and competitors. It also supports companies in reputation management activities and is used by various businesses, from SMBs to large enterprises.

Mention focuses on reputation management and provides fewer features than other providers.  

Key Features

Mention offers various features, as below:

  • Comprehensive online monitoring 
  • Data analytics and access to historical data
  • AI supported automation 

Benefits of Mention

The benefits of Mention revolve around reputation management: 

  • Listen to, analyze, and react to online discussions about your brand, market, and competitors.
  • Improve reputation by building brand awareness and engaging new customers
  • Use the analytics to analyze the competition, your clients, and your company. 

Pricing

Mention has a choice of four plans for potential users: 

  • Solo: USD 49/month
  • Pro: USD 99/month
  • ProPlus: USD 179/month  
  • Company Plan: Customized Pricing 

Pros

✅Good Content Creation Tools

✅Reputation Management 

✅Integration Capabilities

Cons

🚫Limited White Label Features

🚫Limited Marketing Tools  

🚫High Pricing
